final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement screenshot for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout, immersive edge-to-edge visual with brand window/frame treatment
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as hero product, front-and-center
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, visually striking backdrop — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-impact, visually arresting atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a premium, bold brand-exposure direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-gloss premium surface feel — exact material execution is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro" (large, primary hero text), "OPPO" (wordmark/logo placement)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format; must read as a real phone screenshot of a full-screen new-product brand advertisement
Avoid:
